lore.summary: A small but strategically and commercially significant single-system republic in the galactic east, governed from Erewhon and originally founded by organized-crime families who went legitimate. It controls the Erewhon Wormhole Junction, sat as a member of the Manticoran Alliance, and is known for first-rate shipyards and a pragmatic, fiercely independent streak.
lore.note: Authored as a minimal record because Sprint 030 builds the Erewhon system; expand later.
